differences: The administrator center uses FillWork's dark field-operations shell rather than Toss Admin's brighter visual language.
Employee, organization, statistics, and field intelligence are intentionally combined in one executive overview.
Field location and incident intelligence receive more prominence than in generic SaaS administration products.
suggestions: Connect role-based access control and audit logging during the administrator implementation phase.
Add real date-range filtering, chart drilldowns, and employee-management workflows after authentication is available.
Integrate live field location only with explicit employee consent and clear retention controls.
reasoning: The screen delivers an immediate executive overview without becoming a simple table-heavy admin page. KPI hierarchy is clear, management controls remain discoverable, and the dedicated field insight rail makes operational risk, technician location, measurements, uploads, and AI usage visible at a glance.
